name: My workers comp claim got denied in Millcreek, what are my next steps?
description: Appeal via commission hearing; get a lawyer.[2][4]

mainEntity.name: My workers comp claim got denied in Millcreek, what are my next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal via commission hearing; get a lawyer.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request a hearing with the Utah Labor Commission or Idaho Industrial Commission immediately after denial notice.[1][4] Appeals preserve rights if filed timely.[2] Key factors: Gather more medical proof; show AOE/COE; rebut insurer reasons.[1] Practical guidance: Don't sign settlements yet, get legal representation for hearings, and continue treatment. Many denials reverse with proper advocacy.
